svg.title: Agentic CoW Capacity Intelligence Architecture
svg.desc: A WK-style architecture diagram for the implemented capacity intelligence application, including dashboard UI, FastAPI, guarded LangGraph agent, Azure OpenAI, Sumo Logic live ingestion, SQLite persistence, MCP server, and optional FAB Studio integration.
svg.text: Implemented architecture: pure Sumo live telemetry, guarded agent workflow, optional Azure OpenAI summaries, MCP/FAB integration, approvals, and telemetry-quality reporting.
Current demo mode: Pure Sumo live
LLM summaries optional via Azure OpenAI
Missing CPU, short history, stale source,
no primary source shown in summary tile
External agents can discover and call
the same backend tools via MCP
Used when LLM mode is on
Normal runs use stable keys. Force refresh adds a refresh suffix. Analysis is advisory-only. Telemetry gaps are grouped by missing CPU, short history, stale source, and no primary source.
MCP exposes the same ingestion, analysis, recommendation, report, and resource tools for FAB or another MCP client.
